## Description

Briefly describe the changes made.


## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (will break existing functionality)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation (documentation update)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (code change without feature/fix)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance (performance improvement)
- [ ] 🏗️ Configuration (build/dependency changes)


## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding conventions
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my code
- [ ] I have added comments for complex areas
- [ ] My changes don't produce new TypeScript warnings
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] Existing tests still pass (`npm run build`)
